headline: Lululemon (LULU) Stock Could Be Reasonable After Recycling Supply Bet
summary: After a steep five year share price decline of about 71%, lululemon athletica now trades at a level where valuation checks send a mixed message rather than a clear bargain signal. The stock has fallen roughly 71% over five years, which puts the current price in focus for investors asking whether the market has overcorrected. Recent investments in areas such as fulfillment capacity and recycled nylon supply can support long term growth and brand strength, but concerns around competition and...

headline: Lululemon, MAS back $30m Syntetica funding to advance mixed nylon recycling
summary: French deeptech firm Syntetica has secured $30m in Series A funding round to advance its efforts in recycling post-consumer nylon textiles.
